prompt: Slow steady dolly-in toward the glowing smartphone screen from @Image1: night bedroom, a hand wearing a fitness band rests on rumpled sheets beside the phone. On the screen, abstract health charts slowly scroll and gently pulse; the cool blue glow flickers softly across the sheets and skin as the fingers curl almost imperceptibly. Quiet, moody, slightly uneasy atmosphere. No readable text, no logos, no talking.
